title: Cold  Feet?
description:
Frost walker is kinda shit,
so i made it better
body:
# [!!IMPORTANT!! THIS MOD HAS MOVED](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-frost-walker)

<details>
<summary>Old description</summary>

## Better Frostwalker
The Frostwalker base game enchantment is really lacking.
One of the biggest resons is that you can't even sprint jump with the max enchantment level of 2.  
So I made some changes...  
Big thanks to surrender for the config menu and gernal improvement ideas.
### Changes:
- Made Enchantment max level configurable. (default of 4)
- Made ice generation work while sprint jumping and rinding mounts. (most mounts idk if all)
- If the enchantment level is the max level, lava turns to frostet magma.
- Replenish existing frosted blocks even when standing still. (toggleble in settings)
- Replaces waterlogged kelp and seagrass with ice.
### Found a bug or improvement ideas?
hit my line on dc: **herrchaos**

</details>
